chartPattern.explanation: A cup pattern appears to be forming from approximately 2026-01-02 to 2026-02-06, with lows around $69.15 and highs on the rim near $108.86. A handle is forming from 2026-02-06 to 2026-03-11, with a downward drift to lows around $72.99 and a subsequent rise to $81.96. The current price is $109.53, near the top of the cup.
chartPattern.signal: A confirmed breakout above the cup rim resistance around $108.86, especially on increasing volume, could signal a continuation of the prior uptrend and a potential move higher.

fundamentals.name: CoreWeave, Inc.
fundamentals.longBusinessSummary: CoreWeave, Inc. operates as a cloud infrastructure technology company in the United States. The company offers CoreWeave Cloud platform that comprises proprietary software and cloud services that deliver the automation and efficiency needed to manage complex artificial intelligence (AI) infrastructure at scale. It also offers data and storage solutions, such as Local Object Transport Accelerator; infrastructure control solutions, including CoreWeave Kubernetes service; mission control services, including node, rack, and fleet lifecycle management; model and agent development tools comprising Weights & Biases, an AI developer platform; and runtime acceleration. In addition, the company offers graphics processing unit compute, CPU compute, networking services, managed services, and virtual and bare metal servers. Its services also include visual effects rendering, machine learning, pixel streaming, and batch processing. The company was formerly known as Atlantic Crypto Corporation and changed its name to CoreWeave, Inc. in December 2019. CoreWeave, Inc. was incorporated in 2017 and is based in Livingston, New Jersey.

judgment.summary: Rapidly growing but loss-making company with a highly leveraged balance sheet, heavily reliant on large customer deals.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter missed EPS estimates (-1.40 vs -1.20); next earnings date is 2026-05-07.
positives: Revenue growth 111.6% YoY — exceptional top-line expansion.
Gross margin 69.4% — strong unit economics on services rendered.
Consensus 'buy' rating from 32 analysts with a mean target of $138.56.
negatives: Operating margin -6.9% and Profit margin -25.6% — significant operational losses.
Return on equity -40.7% and Return on assets -0.2% — poor profitability metrics.
Debt/Equity 738.54 and Total debt $35.15B vs $2.27B cash — extremely high leverage.
Free cash flow (TTM) $-8.56B — substantial cash burn.
Forward P/E -174.68 and Analyst growth est, current FY -136.5% — valuation is extremely stretched and growth estimates are negative.

news.paragraph: CoreWeave (CRWV) is experiencing significant attention due to its pivot to AI, with recent reports highlighting a substantial $21 billion deal from Meta alongside analyst admiration for its AI strategy. Despite a reported loss of $740 million in the last quarter, the company's revenue growth has been explosive at 111.6% year-over-year. The company's valuation is high, with a forward P/E of -174.68, but analysts maintain a consensus 'buy' rating with a mean target of $138.56.
